/admin/content/files.reason: Reserved /admin namespace path configured as the page path of the 'files' view (display page_1). The view is currently disabled so no route is registered right now, but the path is claimed by that view and would be reclaimed if it is enabled; /admin paths should not be used for node aliases regardless.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: Reserved /admin namespace path configured as the page path of the 'scheduler_scheduled_media' view (overview display). The view is disabled (no active route now) but the scheduler module is enabled, so enabling it reclaims the path; /admin paths should not be used for node aliases regardless.

/blog.reason: Already claimed: a path_alias row maps /blog -> /page/2, which resolves to entity.canvas_page.canonical (an existing Canvas page node). Using it would collide with that node's alias. Note /blog/feed is also a live view RSS feed.

/moderated-content.reason: No route, no alias, and no view targets it. (The Moderated content view lives at /admin/content/moderated, a different path.) Free to use.

/search.reason: Claimed by an active route view.search.page from the enabled 'search' view (this is the View's page display, independent of the core search module, which is not installed). It is a live page.

/this-is-free-xyz.reason: No registered route, no path_alias row, and no view page display claims this path. Free to use as a new node alias.
